message:
style(sqlmodel-frankensqlite): normalize formatting in connection and value modules

Formatting cleanup across the FrankenSQLite adapter:

connection.rs:
- Collapse import group onto single line for readability
- Expand debug log eprintln! calls with proper multi-line formatting
- Break long method chains in debug value formatting
- Format function call arguments across multiple lines consistently

value.rs:
- Expand assertion macros in tests to multi-line format
- Improve readability of integer variant test assertions

No behavioral changes - rustfmt normalization only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
